hero.name: Ayman
hero.description: Full-stack Developer specializing in building scalable, high-performance web applications and automation solutions. Experienced in developing modern React frontends, robust Node.js backends, REST APIs, and AI-powered tools, with a strong focus on clean architecture, maintainable code, and delivering reliable, user-centered products.

about.description: I am a Fullstack Developer with over 5 years of commercial experience building modern web applications, internal services, automation systems, and Telegram bots and mini apps. I specialize in developing frontend and backend applications using React, Node.js, Express, and modern web technologies. I have experience developing and maintaining internal services, Telegram bots and Telegram Mini Apps, automating business processes, building AI tools based on LLMs, and integrating APIs. I am experienced in full-cycle development, from UI and system architecture design to testing, optimization, and maintaining production-ready solutions. I am looking to further develop my skills in Fullstack development and AI/LLM engineering, system architecture design, process automation, and building AI-powered solutions, creating efficient and scalable digital products.

job1.about: Media buying agency specializing in purchasing traffic on social networks.

description.point1: Developing, maintaining, and evolving internal services, Telegram bots, and Telegram Mini Apps.

description.point3: Building AI tools and LLM-powered services for content generation and processing.
description.point4: Building and adapting landing pages/pre-landing pages for different devices.
description.point7: Identifying and fixing bugs, optimizing client-side and server-side code.

achievements.point1: Built an AI-powered white-paper generation service on top of Claude AI (Anthropic): a full-stack web app in React and Node.js/Express, using SQLite for storage and BullMQ + Redis for job queues.
achievements.point2: Implemented automatic HTML page generation, a template library, and archive export for finished projects.
achievements.point3: Built an automated translation service for landing/pre-landing pages via the DeepL API, parsing HTML structure and preserving layout after localization.
achievements.point4: Designed and shipped several internal services and Telegram Mini Apps.
achievements.point5: Built a Node.js Telegram bot that automated routine processes, significantly speeding up operational tasks.
achievements.point6: Built a Playwright project for emulating different User-Agents and automating test scenarios.
achievements.point7: Built a Puppeteer + Node.js bot for automated form filling and submission.
achievements.point8: Built a web app for generating randomized user data with filtering by country and record count.
achievements.point9: Integrated external APIs to keep production web apps running reliably.
achievements.point10: Built and adapted landing/pre-landing pages for different devices, ensuring cross-browser and cross-platform compatibility.
achievements.point11: Improved web form functionality: added interactive elements and a duplicate-submission guard.
achievements.point12: Prepared and localized landing/pre-landing pages for Arabic-speaking audiences, including RTL layout.
achievements.point13: Advised colleagues on responsive and RTL layout, JavaScript optimization, and cross-browser compatibility.

kpis.point1: Built, adapted, and tested 40,000+ landing/pre-landing pages over 4 years.

job1.stack: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express.js, PHP, Redis, BullMQ, SQLite, Playwright, Puppeteer, REST API

works.description: Following projects showcases my skills. Each project is briefly described with links to code repositories and live demos in it. It reflects my ability to solve complex problems, work with different technologies, and manage projects effectively.

work1.title: Whitegen AI - White Paper Generator
work1.description: Built an AI-powered white paper generation platform using Claude AI (Anthropic). Developed a full-stack web application with React and Node.js/Express, using SQLite for data storage and BullMQ with Redis for background job processing and asynchronous document generation.

work2.title: AI Landing Page Localization Service
work2.description: Built an automated translation service using the DeepL API for localizing landing and pre-landing pages. Implemented HTML parsing and structure preservation to translate content while maintaining the original page layout and formatting.

work3.title: Telegram Mini App
work3.description: Developed a Telegram Mini App integrated with Telegram WebApp APIs, providing a seamless application experience directly inside Telegram with backend communication and user workflows.

work4.title: Telegram Automation Bot
work4.description: Created a Telegram bot for automated user interactions, notifications, and workflow management. Integrated external services and backend logic to handle automated processes.

work5.title: Puppeteer Browser Automation Bot
work5.description: Built a Node.js automation system using Puppeteer for automated browser interactions, form filling, and submission workflows. Designed to reduce repetitive manual tasks through browser automation.

work6.title: DaDa Group Platform
work6.description: Developed a platform with an administrative dashboard and internal company services. Built a modern client-side architecture using React, integrated Supabase for data storage and authentication, and implemented user interfaces to support internal business workflows.

work7.title: IronMaster Company Website
work7.description: Developed a modern website for IronMaster, a company specializing in custom metal structures, gates, fences, and construction solutions. Created a responsive interface focused on usability and business presentation.

work1.title: Diagram
work1.description: Social Media App that enable users to create and share content and participate in social networking.

work2.title: E-Shop
work2.description: Online shop, browse product catalogs, create wish lists, add items to a cart, and complete purchases. It also provides payment processing, shipping, and order management capabilities.

work3.title: Weather
work3.description: Stay informed and prepared with Weather App, your ultimate companion for real-time weather updates and forecasts! Designed with a user-friendly interface.

work4.title: Apple iPhone15
work4.description: This project focuses on rebuilding the Apple iPhone 15 Pro website by integrating GSAP animations and 3D effects using Three.js. It provides a comprehensive tutorial on creating everything from unique animations to interactive 3D models.

work6.title: Xora
work6.description: XORA AI Video Editor - SaaS Landing Page.

work7.title: Tracker
work7.description: Track your progress, motivate your efforts, and celebrate your successes - SaaS Landing Page.

work8.title: Mohanad's Portfolio
work8.description: A 3D Marketing Portfolio describes Mohanad's expertise as a Marketer.

work9.title: Aora
work9.description: Social Media App that enable users to create and share content and participate in social networking.

work10.title: Fitness
work10.description: Fitness app designed to help with exercise, other types of physical training, nutrition and diet, and other ways to get fit.

work11.title: LeadHunters
work11.description: Corporate website designed for presenting a LeadHunters company.

work12.title: StoreIt
work12.description: A Google Drive clone application, StoreIt, designed to provide users with a platform for storing, managing, and sharing files. This project demonstrates core functionalities of a cloud storage system with a user-friendly interface and robust backend.

items.name: Igor
items.quote: Ayman consistently turns vague requirements into working features fast. His Telegram bot automations saved our team hours every week.

items.name: Sara
items.quote: Reliable, detail-oriented, and easy to work with. He communicates trade-offs clearly and always delivers production-ready code.

items.name: Mohanad
items.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Ayman on the development of my website, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From the very beginning, Ayman demonstrated exceptional professionalism, creativity, and technical expertise. He took the time to understand my vision and needs, ensuring every detail aligned with my goals.
